steps.t: The approach to Emax Dûl must be scouted for some weakness in the defences.
The approach to the main entrance of Emax Dûl must be scouted for some weakness in the defences.
Glorfindel has also come to scout the defences of Emax Dûl.
Glorfindel fears that fighting your way in to Emax Dûl may be the only option available to you, but Inkanûsh in north-east Ahâba will not like that an…
Mashkânu in north-east Ahâba has an idea.
Jêsamin in north-east Ahâba knows what needs to be done.
